## Tags
sustainability, nature, plant

## Categories
nature, sustainability, seasons

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/flower-2)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Flower2;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Flower2 { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
